title: turnera coriacea
intro: Turnera coriacea, also known as Wild Turnera or Yellow Passionflower, is a perennial plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Turnera coriacea include reducing anxiety and stress, alleviating menstrual cramps and other symptoms of PMS, and promoting relaxation and sleep. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its therapeutic effects.
